common_errors_unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common_errors_NOT_FOUND: The requested resource was not found.
common_errors_UNAUTHORIZED: You are not authorised to perform this action.
common_errors_CONFLICT: A conflict occurred with the current state.
common_errors_TOO_MANY_REQUESTS: Too many requests. Please try again later.
common_errors_SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
common_errors_PAYLOAD_TOO_LARGE: The request payload is too large.
common_errors_SOME_FOUND: Some requested items were found, but not all.
common_errors_COULD_NOT_BE_DESERIALIZED: The value could not be deserialized.
common_errors_COULD_NOT_BE_SERIALIZED: The value could not be serialized.
comms_errors_DELIVERY_RETRY_SCHEDULED: Delivery failed on some channels. A retry has been scheduled.
comms_errors_NO_DELIVERABLE_CHANNELS: No deliverable channels available for the recipient.
geo_validation_address_line1_required: Line 1 is required when address is provided.
geo_validation_address_line2_required: Line 2 is required when Line 3 is provided.
geo_validation_company_name_required: Company name is required when professional details are provided.
geo_validation_first_name_required: First name is required when personal details are provided.
geo_validation_ip_invalid: Must be a valid IPv4 or IPv6 address.
geo_validation_duplicate_ext_keys: Duplicate external keys are not allowed in the same request.
geo_validation_id_invalid: Must be a valid, non-empty identifier.
auth_errors_SIGN_IN_THROTTLED: Too many sign-in attempts. Please try again later.
auth_errors_EMULATION_CONSENT_ALREADY_EX: An active consent already exists for this organisation.
auth_errors_EMULATION_CONSENT_ALREADY_RE: This consent has already been revoked.
auth_errors_EMULATION_ORG_TYPE_NOT_ALLOW: Emulation is not allowed for this organisation type.
auth_errors_ORG_CONTACT_ORG_MISMATCH: The contact does not belong to this organisation.
auth_errors_INVITATION_ROLE_HIERARCHY: Your role does not have permission to invite this role.
middleware_errors_NO_ACTIVE_ORGANIZATION: No active organization. Join or create an organization first.
middleware_errors_ORG_TYPE_NOT_AUTHORIZE: Your organization type is not authorized for this operation.
middleware_errors_INSUFFICIENT_ROLE: You do not have a sufficient role for this operation.
auth_sign_in_description: Enter your credentials to access your account.
auth_sign_up_description: Fill in your details to get started.
webclient_forms_phone_description: Include country code for international numbers.
webclient_forms_postal_code_description: Must match the selected country format.
webclient_hero_tagline: Built for contractors and operators, not accountants. Estimates, scheduling, and invoices — simplified. Decisive Works.
auth_email_verification_body: Please verify your email by clicking the link below:
auth_email_verification_plaintext: Hi {name}, please verify your email by visiting: {url}.
auth_email_link_fallback: If the above link does not work, copy and paste this URL into your browser:
auth_email_password_reset_body: You requested a password reset. Click the link below to set a new password:
auth_email_password_reset_disclaimer: If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.
auth_email_password_reset_plaintext: Hi {name}, reset your password by visiting: {url}. If you didn't request this, ignore this email.
auth_email_invitation_body: {inviterName} ({inviterEmail}) has invited you to join **{orgName}** as **{role}**.
auth_email_invitation_plaintext: {inviterName} ({inviterEmail}) has invited you to join {orgName} as {role}. Accept at: {url}.
auth_email_verified_description: Your email has been verified successfully.
auth_email_failed_description: The verification link is invalid or has expired.
auth_forgot_password_description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth_forgot_password_sent_description: If an account exists with that email, we've sent a password reset link.
auth_forgot_password_sent_note: Check your inbox and click the link to reset your password.
auth_reset_password_success_description: Your password has been reset successfully.
auth_reset_password_success_redirect: Redirecting to sign in in {seconds} seconds...
auth_reset_password_invalid_token_descri: This password reset link is invalid or has expired.
auth_verify_email_description: Check your email and click the verification link to activate your account.
webclient_onboarding_welcome_description: Set up your organisation to get started with DCSV WORX.
webclient_app_dashboard_description: View your organisation's activity and insights.
webclient_design_contact_form_descriptio: Contact form with geo data, phone formatting, and cascading selects.
webclient_design_signup_form_description: Signup form with password rules, confirmation fields, and async validation.
webclient_debug_session_description: Inspect authentication state, session data, and request context.
webclient_debug_health_description: System health status and service diagnostics.
webclient_legal_terms_description: Review the terms and conditions for using DCSV WORX.
webclient_legal_terms_placeholder: Terms of Service content will be added here.
webclient_legal_privacy_description: Learn how DCSV WORX handles your data.
webclient_legal_privacy_placeholder: Privacy Policy content will be added here.
auth_verify_email_resent_message: Your email hasn't been verified yet. We've resent the verification link.
auth_verify_email_sent_message: We've sent a verification link to your email.
auth_verify_email_activate_message: Click the link in the email to activate your account.
webclient_app_dashboard_overview_placeho: Dashboard content will be built in Step 10.
webclient_app_profile_placeholder: Profile form will be built in Step 10.
webclient_app_settings_placeholder: Settings forms will be built in Step 10.
webclient_onboarding_welcome_setup_messa: Let's get you set up. Choose an existing organisation to join or create a new one.
webclient_onboarding_welcome_placeholder: Organisation selection will be wired in Step 8 (Onboarding flow).
webclient_debug_health_dev_description: Dev-only — aggregated health from Gateway to all services via gRPC
webclient_debug_health_gateway_unreachab: Could not connect to the .NET Gateway health endpoint.
webclient_debug_session_dev_description: Dev-only — inspects all auth & request context
webclient_debug_session_cookies_descript: Cookie names only (values hidden for security)
webclient_debug_session_click_fetch: Click "Fetch Client Data" to load client-side session and JWT.
webclient_debug_session_no_request_conte: No request context (middleware not running — Redis/Geo not available)
webclient_design_kitchen_sink: Kitchen sink — preview all components with live theme editing.
webclient_design_contact_form_demo_descr: Demonstrates Superforms + Formsnap with geo reference data, cascading selects, phone formatting, and cross-field validation.
webclient_design_contact_cache_descripti: All fields use live geo reference data from the 4-tier cache (Memory → Redis → Disk → gRPC).
webclient_design_signup_form_demo_descri: Demonstrates password rules, email/password confirmation, show/hide toggle, and async email availability check.
webclient_design_signup_card_description: Password rules mirror the auth service: min 12 chars, no numeric-only, no date-like patterns.
webclient_design_demo_contact_form_descr: Superforms + geo data, phone formatting, cascading selects
webclient_design_demo_signup_form_descri: Password rules, email/password confirmation, show/hide toggle
